meaning: adj.[昆] 鳞翅类的n.鳞翅类
examples: VIP3 shows activity against many lepidopteran insect larvae.
Cycloechinulin has not been extensively studied but has been reported to exhibit insecticidal activity against the lepidopteran crop pest Helicoverpa zea.
If lepidopteran mine detectors work, they could be the start of a new industry.
